description: Training-only out-of-corpus questions used to teach the adapter to ABSTAIN. None of these are answerable from the 8 corpus documents, so the correct completion is the exact refusal sentence with no citation. These are DISJOINT from data/golden/holdout.json (the held-out abstention cases) so the abstention skill is evaluated on unseen refusals. Never add these to the golden eval set.
refusal: I could not find this information in the provided documents.

questions.question: What is the reflection period to cancel an online purchase under the Consumer Defense Code?
Under what conditions can a worker withdraw their FGTS balance?
How long is maternity leave for a formally employed worker in Brazil?
At what age does voting become mandatory for Brazilian citizens?
What is the minimum retirement age under the general social security regime?
What is the monetary ceiling of the small claims civil courts (juizados especiais)?
Is there a mandatory waiting period before a divorce can be granted in Brazil?
What is the IPVA tax rate applied to passenger vehicles?
What portion of an estate is reserved for necessary heirs under Brazilian inheritance law?
What is the limit for individual donations to electoral campaigns in Brazil?
